svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Workflow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-534" dy="-417" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="1640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Order Lifecycle — End-to-End Workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="40" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Start" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Browse vendors & products
(public catalog)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Add items to cart" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Checkout (Idempotency-Key)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Payment
confirmed?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="380" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Order CANCELLED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="760" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Vendor notified" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Vendor
accepts?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="380" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="Rejected → REFUND" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="760" y="655" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Preparing → Ready for pickup" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Dispatch: first eligible courier
in operating zone (APPROVED+online)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="360" y="870" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Courier
accepts?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="380" y="970" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Reassign
(exclude prior courier)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="760" y="985" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Pickup at vendor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="1110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="On route to customer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="1200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="6-digit OTP
valid?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="380" y="1290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Retry / FAILED_DELIVERY
→ refund path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="760" y="1305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="DELIVERED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="360" y="1430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="End" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="400" y="1530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w0" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="p1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="p2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="p3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="d1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w4" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="f1" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w5" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="p4" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w6" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="d2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w7" edge="1" parent="1" source="d2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="f2" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w8" edge="1" parent="1" source="d2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="p5" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w9" edge="1" parent="1" source="p5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="p6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w10" edge="1" parent="1" source="p6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="d3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w11" edge="1" parent="1" source="d3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#d79b00;" target="f3" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w11b" edge="1" parent="1" source="f3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="p6" value="retry"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w12" edge="1" parent="1" source="d3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="p7" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w13" edge="1" parent="1" source="p7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="p8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w14" edge="1" parent="1" source="p8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="d4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w15" edge="1" parent="1" source="d4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="f4" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w16" edge="1" parent="1" source="d4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="p9" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w17" edge="1" parent="1" source="p9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="end"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
